name: Sports-125
description: In the wake of the 91st Grand Prix, the WRL underwent a period of internal restructuring. Corrupt canals were cleaned out, and in their place stood new internal regulatory agencies to formulate and organize the future of the top-level racing series. One of their first big projects was in response to the slight decline in entry numbers in the seasons that followed: they commissioned the development of a new generation of entry-level cars similar to the T-180 in concept, but standardized, cost-reduced, and most importantly, easier to drive for those aiming to compete at the top in the future.
author: ohyeah2389
